title: PokemonPurpleBlade
description:

body:
This modpack is a collection of various mods and datapacks for cobblemon. It introduces new buildings, Pokemon, leader gyms, new elements and items that diversify the passage. 

!All hostile mobs are turned off using you shall not spawn since some Pokemon will pester you anyway. If you want them back just turn off this mod!
